title: with_*_key pattern copy-pasted across 7 files
description: The scoped-key guard pattern (generate/cache, call f, mark ERASED, evict, propagate result) is copy-pasted verbatim in aes.rs, cmac.rs, ecc.rs, ed25519.rs, curve25519.rs, rsa.rs, and mldsa.rs. The logic is identical in all 7 cases. Any bug fix or policy change (e.g. how to handle eviction errors on the error path) must be applied 7 times. Suggested rewrite: extract a free function in client.rs or a shared internal module: fn with_key<K, F, R>(key: K, id: KeyId, client: &mut Client, f: F) -> Result<R, WolfHsmError> where K: ..., F: FnOnce(&K, &mut Client) -> Result<R, WolfHsmError> { let result = f(&key, client); // set ERASED, evict, propagate } Each with_*_key method becomes a one-liner that calls this helper. Alternatively a declarative macro would also eliminate the duplication.
